auth.subtitle: Server and GPU Management System
auth.credentials: Enter your credentials to access the system
auth.noAccess: Restricted access system. Authorized personnel only.
auth.userInactive: User inactive, please contact an administrator to request account activation

home.serverListDescription: Here you can see all the servers you have access to and manage your GPU reservations.

NotificationButton.title: Notifications
NotificationButton.description: Here you can see all your notifications.

Schema.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

Schemas.nameTooLong: The name cannot be longer than 50 characters
Schemas.firstSurnameTooLong: The first surname cannot be longer than 50 characters
Schemas.newPasswordMin: The new password must be at least 6 characters long
Schemas.newPasswordMax: The new password cannot be longer than 20 characters
Schemas.confirmNewPassword: You must confirm the new password
Schemas.juniorMustHaveResearcherAssigned: A Junior must have an assigned researcher

Route.unauthorized: You do not have permission to edit users

ProfileSheet.title: My Profile
ProfileSheet.description: Here you can view and edit your profile information.
ProfileSheet.name: Name

ChangePassword.title: Change Password
ChangePassword.description: Here you can change your access password.

management.title: User Management
management.description: Here you can view and manage all users in the system.
management.name: Name
management.assignServersDescription: Here you can assign or revoke server access for this user.
management.assignResearcherDescription: Here you can assign or change the researcher assigned to this user.
management.addUserDescription: Here you can add a new user to the system.

Schemas.nameMin: The server name must be at least 3 characters long
Schemas.nameMax: The server name cannot exceed 100 characters
Schemas.ramGBMin: RAM must be at least 1 GB
Schemas.diskCountInvalid: Disk count must be a number
Schemas.diskCountInt: Disk count must be an integer
Schemas.diskCountMin: Disk count must be at least 1
Schemas.gpuRamGBInvalid: GPU RAM must be a number
Schemas.gpuRamGBInt: GPU RAM must be an integer
Schemas.gpuRamGBMin: GPU must have at least 1 GB of RAM
Schemas.gpuMin: At least one GPU is required

Route.unauthorized: You do not have permission to manage servers
Route.setServerAvailableError: Could not mark server as available
Route.setServerMaintenanceError: Could not mark server as under maintenance
Route.serverExists: A server with that name already exists
Route.serverNameExists: A server with that name already exists

CreateServer.description: Here you can add a new server to the system.

serverList.noSearchResults: No results found for the search.
serverList.errorLoadingServers: An error occurred while loading servers.

details.description: Here you can view the details of the server, its status, and logs.

Edit.title: Edit Server
Edit.description: Here you can edit your server information.
Edit.name: Server Name

Schemas.selectGpu: You must select at least one GPU

Route.invalidExtendedUntil: The extension date is required and must be valid
Route.cannotExtendCancelledCompletedOrExtended: Cannot extend a reservation that is extended, completed, or cancelled
Route.extendedUntilMustBeAfterCurrentEnd: The new end date must be after the current one
Route.extensionOverlapsWithAnotherReservation: The extension overlaps with another existing reservation
Route.theStartHourMustBeBeforeEndHour: The start time must be before the end time
Route.noReservationsInThePast: You cannot create reservations in the past
Route.noAccessToServer: You do not have access to the specified server
Route.gpuNotFoundOrNotBelong: Some GPUs do not exist or do not belong to the specified server
Route.gpuAlreadyReserved: One or more GPUs are already reserved in that date range

reservationsList.noSearchResults: No results found for the search.
reservationsList.extendForHours: How many hours do you want to extend? (1-12)
reservationsList.errorExtending: An error occurred while extending the reservation

createReservation.title: Create GPU Reservation
createReservation.description: Here you can request the use of a GPU on one of your assigned servers.
createReservation.noAvailableGpus: No available GPUs in the selected range.

calendar.title: GPU Reservations Calendar
calendar.description: View GPU reservations in a calendar. Click on a reservation to see more details.
calendar.error: An error occurred while loading reservations. Please try again later.
calendar.reservationDetailsDescription: Here you can view the details of the selected reservation.

logMessage.server_unavailable: The server {0} has been marked as unavailable
